'''zashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yea|yea]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yea|yea]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zashate|zashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zashatesher|zashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zashatesherĂ«m|zashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zashatero|zashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zashateshĂ«|zashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zashateshĂ«m|zashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizashatero|gokizashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizashateshĂ«|gokizashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizashateshĂ«m|gokizashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozashankerom|gozashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozashankeshĂ«|gozashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozashankeshĂ«m|gozashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozashankeya|gozashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zashaterom|zashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zashatemu|zashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zashateya|zashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizashaterom|gokizashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizashatemu|gokizashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizashateya|gokizashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zashashate|zashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zashashatesher|zashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zashashatesherĂ«m|zashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zashashatero|zashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zashashateshĂ«|zashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zashashateshĂ«m|zashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizashashatero|gokizashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizashashateshĂ«|gokizashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizashashateshĂ«m|gokizashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozashashankerom|gozashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozashashankeshĂ«|gozashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozashashankeshĂ«m|gozashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozashashankeya|gozashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zashashaterom|zashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zashashatemu|zashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zashashateya|zashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizashashaterom|gokizashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizashashatemu|gokizashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizashashateya|gokizashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠte|zĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠtesher|zĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠtero|zĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠshĂŠtero|gokizĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠshĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠshĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠterom|zĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠtemu|zĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠshĂŠteya|zĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠshĂŠterom|gokizĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠshĂŠteya|gokizĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafshafte|zafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafshaftesher|zafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafshaftesherĂ«m|zafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafshaftero|zafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafshafteshĂ«|zafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafshafteshĂ«m|zafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafshaftero|gokizafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafshafteshĂ«|gokizafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafshafteshĂ«m|gokizafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafshafnkerom|gozafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafshafnkeshĂ«|gozafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafshafnkeshĂ«m|gozafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafshafnkeya|gozafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafshafterom|zafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafshaftemu|zafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafshafteya|zafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafshafterom|gokizafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafshaftemu|gokizafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafshafteya|gokizafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
